title: Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a creator in Nigeria, struggling to sell digital products due to Gumroad's payout delays? You're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries face similar hurdles when trying to monetize their work through popular platforms like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. It's time to explore alternatives that can help you get paid instantly, without the frustration of delayed payments or expensive fees.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, PayPal, and Stripe promise a seamless experience for creators, but the reality is far from it. They impose strict regulations, charge hefty fees, and often delay payouts to creators in restricted countries. In contrast, Core Shop Engine offers a full backend with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without the need for a payment processor account. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while Unchained Commerce handles the technicalities.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Stripe's availability map lists 46 supported countries. The rest of the world — including Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, and Tanzania — is simply excluded. There is no appeals process. There is no waitlist. There is no timeline for when Stripe might expand to these markets. Gumroad and Payhip operate within the same conventional financial system, which means they face similar restrictions on payouts to certain regions. When these platforms do support your country nominally, the payout delays, currency conversion fees, and arbitrary holds can make the actual revenue you receive significantly less than what your buyers paid. Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses these layers entirely.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Gumroad and PayPal charge hefty fees for transactions, often up to 10% or more. Stripe also charges competitive fees, but with a catch – they require a verified account, which can be difficult to obtain in restricted countries. Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments integration offers a fee-free experience, with instant payouts and no need for a verified account. This means you get to keep more of your hard-earned money, without the hassle of dealing with payment processors.
Gumroad's blocked countries list is a thing of the past with Unchained Commerce.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad's manual delivery process can be time-consuming and prone to errors. PayPal and Stripe also require manual intervention for delivery, which can lead to delays and frustration. Core Shop Engine's automated delivery system ensures that customers receive their purchases instantly, with no need for manual intervention. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, while Unchained Commerce handles the delivery and fulfillment.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're tired of dealing with delayed payouts, exorbitant fees, and restrictive policies, it's time to explore alternatives. Choose Core Shop Engine and Unchained Commerce for a seamless, global experience that works everywhere. With our full backend, automated delivery, and NOWPayments integration, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, without the hassle of dealing with payment processors.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments integration offers instant payouts, no matter where you are in the world.
